subject: recommended offer by ice for ipe holdings

emails.subject: FW: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.subject_base: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.body: FW: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings Your thoughts on this? Also, assuming we accept, then what? Are we an owner in ICE? GP To: Whalley, Greg; Sherriff, John; Brown, Michael; Piper, Greg; Zipper, Andy

emails.subject: RE: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.subject_base: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.body: RE: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings If we accept, then yes our IPE shares get converted to ICE shares.

emails.subject: RE: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.subject_base: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.body: OK, so how much do we own and what rights will we have and do we do anything with it? GP To: Piper, Greg

emails.subject: FW: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.subject_base: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.body: Does our less than 1% get us more relavent info than if we just pulled from publically available? GP

emails.subject: RE: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.subject_base: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings
emails.body: RE: Recommended Offer by ICE for IPE Holdings I don't know.
